title: Railway Modpack
description: A modpack curated from multiple railway mods available in the community, allowing everyone to build and enjoy their own personalized railway systems.
body:
English：A modpack curated from multiple railway mods available in the community, allowing everyone to build and enjoy their own personalized railway systems.
简体中文（中国大陆）：使用社区上的多个铁路模组创作出来的整合包，让大家拥有属于自己的铁路
声明：此整合包为hzj创作，部分资源可能无法与中国网站同步，如果您是中国人，想要获取更多本作者的资源，请到这个网址：[BBSMC](https://bbsmc.net/user/hzj666)（单击BBSMC即可进入网站）

<details>
<summary>You can go ahead and show off to your friends!!!（中国人展开看翻译）</summary>

可以找你的好友炫耀！！！

</details>
